what: Check content quality (non-empty, has headings, reasonable length)
why: Detect low-quality or empty entries that reduce knowledge effectiveness
output: Content quality results with per-entry quality scores and issue flags

success_handling.criteria: Content quality check completes for all entries

error_handling.criteria: One or more entries are empty, lack headings, or have unreasonable length
error_handling.action: Record all issues, continue audit with remaining checks

event.message: Content quality issues found in {issue_count} entries

decisions.outcome: Record issues, proceed to check-db-consistency step
